_source: Playwright-scraped from public Google Maps profile (2026-05-18) + supplementary data from magistrum.net contact page + magistrum.in/about. Some fields ('full week hours', 'reviews', 'photo URLs') are limited because Google Maps unauth view truncates them.
name: Magistrum Corpserve Solution LLC - Zoho Authorised Training & Implementation Partner
niche_classification: B2B SaaS implementation + corporate training (Zoho ecosystem)
review_count_note: Google does not show a count number; the Reviews tab is not present. Interpreted as 0 publicly visible reviews (a rating can exist with private/recent reviews not yet surfaced).

address.raw: DIP - 1, Bin Sougat Building - Unit No R05 - Dubai - United Arab Emirates
address.formatted_single_line: Unit R05, Bin Sougat Building, DIP-1, Dubai, UAE

coordinates.note: From the Maps URL params; this is a generic Dubai centroid Google used — the actual DIP-1 location is slightly different (~25.0, 55.18). Use the address text as the source of truth.

hours_assumption_note: Google publishes only Monday. Assumed Mon-Sat 9-9 based on UAE B2B norms (post-2022 weekend = Sat-Sun) and Monday being the published anchor. USER SHOULD CONFIRM ACTUAL HOURS before launch; conservative would be Mon-Fri 9-6.

services.name: Google Workspace to Zoho Workplace Migration
services.trend_note: Featured in their May 2026 owner post

owner_recent_post.title: Google Workspace vs Zoho Workplace — Which Platform Is Right for Your Business in 2026?
owner_recent_post.topic: Comparing Google Workspace and Zoho Workplace for businesses in UAE/India/global markets
owner_recent_post.useful_for: blog content, chatbot KB, hero copy theme

description: Magistrum Corpserve Solutions LLC is a Zoho Authorised Training & Implementation Partner serving SMEs and enterprises across the UAE, India, and global markets. The company operates two divisions: end-to-end Zoho ecosystem implementation (Finance Suite, CRM, Contracts, Sign, Workplace, integrations) for businesses, and authorised training & certification programs (Zoho Books, Tally Prime, HATS, SAP FICO) for individuals seeking accounting and ERP careers.
mission_self_stated: To empower both individuals and businesses with practical, in-demand skills and technology solutions required to succeed in today's digital economy.
credentials: Zoho Authorised Training Institute (Zoho Finance Suite product training)
Zoho trusted partner (specific tier — Authorised / Advanced / Premium — not stated on public profile; needs user confirmation)
unique_selling_points_observed: Dual offer: business Zoho implementation + workforce certification training under one roof
Authorised partner status with both Zoho and Tally — dual-platform credibility
'100% Lifetime Job Assurance' on training programs (per magistrum.in)
Cross-border presence (India HQ + UAE LLC) — valuable for clients with operations on both sides of the Arabian Sea
Active content marketing (recent owner post on GMB about Zoho vs Google Workspace) — they’re publishing, but their website doesn’t showcase this depth of expertise
photo_urls_note: Limited-view Maps page exposes only 3 thumbnail URLs (googleusercontent placeholders). Real GMB photos accessible only with auth. Will use Unsplash + curated stock for hero/galleries; recommend user upload real DIP-1 office + team photos post-conversion.
_user_should_confirm_before_launch: Full week hours (only Monday is published; the build assumes Mon-Sat 9-9, Sun closed)
Which phone number to feature as primary on the new site (+971 58 899 1583 from GMB vs +971 52 523 6698 from .net website)
Zoho partner tier (Authorised vs Advanced vs Premium — affects hero trust badge wording)
Specific UAE clients you have permission to name / logo (drives the social-proof strip)
DED trade licence number + VAT TRN (for footer compliance block)
